rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GRACE SIU
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petition requests distribution of 50% of the estate, solely consisting of personal property, to 10 heirs of the decedent's predeceased spouse under Probate Code section 6402(a)(3) because the decedent's spouse died in 2007, less than 15 years before the decedent died in 2020. However, the decedent owned no real property at the time of her death because the real property had been sold. Law Revision Commission Commentary to section 6402.5 specifically states, in citing Estate of Luke (1987) 194 Cal.App.3d 1006, that: "Under the present section, since the husband survived his wife by over five years, her relatives would not share in his personal property, presumably not even if it was derived from the sale of real property which he had inherited from his wife". PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LILLIAN WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Requiring Return Of Estate Property Pursuant To Probate Code 850
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: (1) Notice of Hearing On Petition to Determine Claim to Property [DE-115] must be given. Notice of Hearing on file is DE-120. Also, notice directions for remote appearances and access need to be given. LRSF 14.1.C.6). (2) Service to Mr. Torress to be made in compliance with CCP 413.10. Prob. Code sec. 851(a)(2). (3) Service to other interested parties are made electronically; however, no consents to electronic service on file. Prob. Code sec.851(b)(b)(1). Sec. 1215(c). (4) Proposed order to be revised to include the insurance related relief as brought by the amendment. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ZACHARIAH NETHERCOT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The decedent's original holographic will cannot be located. According to the petitioner, the original will was last in the decedent's possession, and the decedent was competent until his death. The Court is to determine whether the petitioner's statement that the "decedent frequently stated to the petitioner that the 12/25/2021 will was the only will the decedent created" is sufficient to rebut the Probate Code section 6124 presumption that the decedent destroyed the will with intent to revoke. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DAVID C. GUTEKUNST LIVING TRUST EXCECUTED june 25, 2004, as amended and restated on Apr 14 23
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions Amendments And Restatement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/19/2024, in light of the pending conservatorship proceeding involving the petitioner as proposed conservate (PCN-23-306910). The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or e-lodged. 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 30 days before the hearing. 3) Paragraph 8 of the petition must state the names and addresses of all beneficiaries under the trust prior to the restatement. Notice must be given to them. 4) Notice must be given to the attorney for the petitioner appointed by the Court in the conservatorship case. 5) Notice must be given to the temporary conservator if appointed and his attorney of record in the conservatorship case.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGIA L. LESSER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/6/2024. The following issues to be cleared seven days prior: (1) Need re-notice. Notice of hearing [DE-120] is on file; however, Notice of Petition to Administer Estate [DE-121] must be used. Prob. Code sec. 8100. (2) Need Notice of Direction for Remote Appearances and Access to be served with the notice. LRSF 14.1.C.6). (3) Notice to be sent to all named alternate executors (Farrell and Dunn) (4) Need a declaration of due diligence to locate Cohen (niece). CRC 7.52. (5) Need Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E. (6) Petition #8 to identify the ancestor (sibling of the decedent) of Besser and Cole. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
